name: BB:Database: System Action Deny
notes: Edit this BB to include any events that indicate unsuccessful actions within a database
bb_references: BB:Database: System Action Deny on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following System.System Action Deny
when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Database Servers, BB:HostReference: Database Servers
TD_list: APPLY BB:Database: System Action Deny on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.System Action Deny
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: Database Servers, BB:HostReference: Database Servers
